name: Ambrx Biopharma Inc. American Depositary Shares
summary: Ambrx Biopharma Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) using its proprietary Expanded Genetic Code technology platform. The company aims to create novel ADCs with improved safety and efficacy for cancer treatment. Ambrx Biopharma is headquartered in San Diego, California.
